title: rubus schleicheri var. humifusus
intro: Rubus schleicheri var. humifusus, a type of dwarf black raspberry, is a low-growing, woody perennial plant native to the Himalayas. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rubus schleicheri var. humifusus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
